The median factor is 1.879.

Converting 30.18:
30.18 * 1.879:
30.18 * 0.009 = 0.27162
30.18 * 0.070 = 2.11260
30.18 * 0.800 = 24.14400
30.18 * 1.000 = 30.18000
0.27162 + 2.11260 = 2.38422
2.38422 + 24.14400 = 26.52822
26.52822 + 30.18000 = 56.70822
= 56.708

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{56.708}
